backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining Task and TeamMember data types with CRUD operations: createTask, updateTaskStatus, deleteTask, getAllTasks, getTasksByAssignee, addTeamMember, removeTeamMember. Uses migration hook and includes an optional conferenceName field on tasks.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms OldTask records (without conferenceName) to NewTask records (with conferenceName defaulting to null), preserving teamMembers unchanged.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming the 'Conference Name' optional field was added to CreateTaskModal.tsx, TaskCard.tsx, and csvExport.ts with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON summaries of all frontend source files describing each component, hook, and utility's purpose in 1–2 sentences.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base CSS defining OKLCH-based design tokens for light and dark themes including background, foreground, card, border, and sidebar color variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point titled 'Team Task Manager' that mounts the React app at the #root div via src/main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component setting up TanStack Router with two routes ('/' for AdminDashboard, '/my-tasks' for TeamMemberView), dark ThemeProvider, and Sonner Toaster.
Dialog form component for creating tasks with fields for title, optional conference name, description, assignee, deadline, and priority; validates required fields and calls the createTask mutation with conferenceName.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: App shell component rendering a sticky header with logo, Dashboard/My Tasks nav links, and a NotificationBell, plus a main content area and footer with caffeine.ai attribution.
A dialog modal for managing team members, allowing users to add new members by name and remove existing ones, with toast notifications for success/error feedback.
frontend/src/components/NotificationBell: A bell icon button that shows a dropdown panel listing task reminders categorized as overdue, critical (due < 1hr), or warning (due < 24hr), with a badge showing total count.
frontend/src/components/PriorityBadge.ts: A small badge component that renders a styled pill with emoji and label for High, Medium, or Low task priority levels.
frontend/src/components/ReportExportButt: Renders two buttons to export tasks filtered by the current week or current month as downloadable CSV files with date-stamped filenames.
frontend/src/components/TaskCard.tsx: Displays a single task as a card with title, priority badge, urgency indicator, assignee, deadline, and optional description toggle, plus status control and delete confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/components/TaskFilters.tsx: Provides a search input and assignee dropdown to filter tasks, with a clear button that appears when any filter is active.
frontend/src/components/TaskStatusContro: A dropdown select control for updating a task's status (Pending, In Progress, Completed) with a loading spinner and toast notifications on change.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, returning an anonymous actor when unauthenticated and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication, wrapping DFINITY's AuthClient to expose login, logout, and identity state with status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating task/team data (getAllTasks, createTask, updateTaskStatus, deleteTask, addTeamMember, etc.) via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useTaskFilters.ts: A memoized hook that filters a list of tasks by search text and assignee based on provided filter state.
frontend/src/hooks/useTaskReminders.ts: A hook that categorizes all tasks into overdue, due within one hour, and due within 24 hours buckets using reminder logic utilities.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, sets up Tailwind, and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens including urgency, chart, and sidebar variables.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard page displaying task statistics, filterable/sortable task list, and modals for creating tasks and managing team members.
frontend/src/pages/TeamMemberView.tsx: Team member view page that lets a user select their name from a dropdown to see their assigned tasks with status summary badges.
frontend/src/utils/csvExport.ts: Provides utilities to generate and download CSV files from task arrays, including helpers to format deadlines, priorities, and statuses, plus filters for tasks due within the current week or month.
frontend/src/utils/reminderLogic.ts: Exports three boolean helper functions that check whether a task is overdue, due within one hour, or due within twenty-four hours based on its deadline nanosecond timestamp.
frontend/src/utils/taskSorting.ts: Exports a single function that sorts an array of tasks first by nearest deadline, then by priority (High → Medium → Low) as a tiebreaker.
frontend/src/utils/taskUrgency.ts: Defines urgency level classification for tasks (overdue, critical, warning, normal, completed) and exports helper functions to compute urgency, retrieve corresponding Tailwind CSS classes, and check deadline proximity.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration that sets up dark mode, custom fonts (Inter, Space Grotesk), an extended color palette using OKLCH CSS variables (including urgency semantic colors and sidebar tokens), custom border radii, box shadows, and animation keyframes.
project_state.json: Tracks the overall project state including version, a summary of the app (React + Motoko ICP task manager), architectural notes, known issues, and a list of implemented feature descriptors with their requirement IDs.
